content:
# Docs Workflow & Interactive Knowledge Dashboard — Implementation Plan

> **Status:** Active

**Goal:** Implement the Docs Workflow design spec (Approach B — Full Loop) across 4 phases: metadata extensions, dashboard graphed document reader, intelligence checks, and hook enforcement.

**Architecture:** Extend `EntryMetadata` with `content_role`/`source_origin` fields. Add post-filter to retrieval pipeline. Build split-panel graph+reader dashboard. Extend Reasoner with doc-specific checks. Generate enforcement hooks from `corvia.toml`.

**Tech Stack:** Rust (corvia kernel/server/CLI), Preact + TypeScript (dashboard), Bash (hook scripts), TOML (config)

**Spec:** `docs/decisions/2026-03-13-docs-workflow-design.md`

---
